TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ciataw, title = Ciataw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciataw} }

S.FORM: Ciataw Itiniay i Chishang Cen no Taitung ko Ciataw a niyaro', 868 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,284 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 12% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 264 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 88% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2,020 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 9%, Bunun 1%, Paiwan 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦiataw itiniaj i ʦħisħaŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦiataw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Ciataw Itiniay i Chishang Cen no Taitung ko Ciataw a niyaro', 868 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,284 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 12% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 264 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 88% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2,020 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 9%, Bunun 1%, Paiwan 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦiataw itiniaj i ʦħisħaŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦiataw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
